clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Youth applicants had to be Bucheon residents aged 19 to 34.

clauses.title: Required Documents
clauses.text: Applicants had to submit a lease contract, resident registration, and a loan certificate.

clauses.title: Application Deadline
clauses.text: Applications closed on September 30 each year.

clauses.title: Support Amount
clauses.text: Interest support amount was up to 1000000 KRW per year.
